brand.name: Rajat Bhatheja
brand.tagline: I help teams turn data and AI into production systems.

hero.headline: Turning data and AI into systems that ship.
hero.sub: 15+ years building production-grade data platforms and agentic AI — MCP, multi-agent orchestration, and RAG. I write about it at The Data Muse.

about.title: About
body: I'm Rajat — a Data & AI Architect at Microsoft. I design and build production agentic systems: Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations, multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, and the data platforms underneath them.

I care about the unglamorous parts that make AI actually work in production — clean data contracts, grounded outputs, evaluation, and disciplined lifecycle management. I teach with analogies and real examples, because the best systems are simple, not clever.

writing.title: Writing — The Data Muse
writing.intro: Essays on GenAI, LLMs, AI agents, data engineering, and analytics platforms — teaching the hard parts in plain language.

items.p: Designing multi-agent systems and Model Context Protocol tools that are reliable in production.
Retrieval, grounding, and evaluation patterns that keep LLM outputs trustworthy.
Modular, open-format data architectures — decoupled storage/compute, governance, contracts.
The lifecycle discipline that turns a demo into a system teams depend on.

connect.title: Get in touch
connect.body: Always up for a good conversation on data, AI, and building things that last.
